# STRUCTURED FAKE — synthetic fixture for router contract test, NOT a real run
# These values are seeded constants representing DRAKE Wolfram Language stdout
# as documented in plugins/hep-ph-toolkit/skills/drake/SKILL.md lines 190-225.
# DRAKE prints Oh2_nBE / Oh2_cBE / Oh2_fBE (NOT "Omega h^2").
# Acceptance regex: Oh2_(nBE|cBE|fBE)\s*=\s*([0-9eE.+\-]+)
#
# Seed values (use to verify parser output in tests):
#   SEED_omega_h2  = 0.12052366691892884  (Oh2_nBE from WIMP benchmark, ws-h-impl-3)
#   SEED_xf        = 22.4

*************************
WIMP settings_WIMP parameters_WIMP
-----------------------
Oh2_nBE = 0.12052366691892884
-----------------------
...gamma(x) done. Time [s]: 1.2
Computing cBE...
...<sv>_2 done. Time [s]: 0.9
...cBE done. Time [s]: 2.1
-----------------------
Oh2_cBE = 0.12051
-----------------------
Computing fBE...
...<sv>_theta done. Time [s]: 1.0
...fBE done. Time [s]: 3.3
-----------------------
Oh2_fBE = 0.12050
-----------------------

result  Oh2nBE               Oh2cBE   Oh2fBE   time [s]
calculated  0.12052366691892884  0.12051  0.12050  7.6
